body:
This PR adds support for fractional C3 and C4 for the ~~`FarquharModel`~~ `PModel`.

The name `is_c3` is changed to `fractional_c3` to better reflect this. Support for fractional C3/C4 for the `PModel` will be done in ~~another~~ this PR.
title: Support fractional C3/C4 for PModel
